visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A pair of silver scissors cuts through a golden-brown pan-fried bun. As the blades meet, a visible spray of clear liquid squirts onto a black textured plate. A large brand logo is overlaid at the top. (2) A woman with a blue bucket hat and a white long-sleeved shirt stands inside a brightly lit warehouse store. She gestures excitedly with both hands toward a glass-door freezer filled with stacks of red and yellow boxes. (3) Close-up shots focus on the packaging, showing images of the buns and Chinese characters. The woman picks up a box and presents it to the camera with a wide smile. (4) Several small, round buns are arranged in a grey non-stick pan, their bottoms turning dark brown from frying. A metal tool is used to move them. (5) The scene shifts to an indoor dining area where two women sit at a table. One wears a red bucket hat and a yellow striped shirt; the other has long dark hair and a purple top. They use chopsticks to pick up the small buns, showing the insides to the lens before eating and giving thumbs-up gestures.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 噴汁. (2) [Slogan]: 一顆4元 還爆汁. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 最便宜的生煎包. (3) [Slogan]: 好市多 最便宜的生煎包. (4) [Slogan]: 陳品冷凍 迷你生煎包. (5) [Variety]: 80顆. (6) [Slogan]: 就很好吃. (7) [Variety]: 大爆汁. (8) [Slogan]: 小朋友吃要注意不要燙到.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main female creator (appearing in both blue and red hats) and one female companion in the dining scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main woman wears a blue bucket hat with a white long-sleeved top in the store, and later a red bucket hat with a yellow striped shirt at home.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first scene is a Costco freezer aisle with commercial shelving and glass doors. The second scene is a residential interior with a wooden dining table and a blurred living room background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A sharp metallic cutting sound is immediately followed by a high-pressure squelching spray sound. Upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM enters with a persistent kick drum. (2) A female voice speaks with high arousal and rapid pacing, describing a product. A digital 'ping' sound effect marks the appearance of text. The BGM remains energetic. (3) A muffled sizzling sound is audible beneath the narration as the speaker continues with rising intonation. (4) Another 'snip' and 'squirt' sound effect repeats, followed by a 'whoosh' transition. The vocal delivery shifts to a slightly more conversational tone but remains high-pitched. (5) Two female voices interact; the primary narrator continues her enthusiastic description while secondary vocal reactions like 'mmm' are heard. Sounds of plastic rustling and chopsticks tapping on a plate are mixed into the high-energy BGM bed.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Introduction -> Product Inspection -> Cooking/Eating Demonstration -> Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a specific brand of frozen mini pan-fried buns available at Costco. It uses visual 'hook' footage of juice spraying out to capture attention, followed by a value-for-money argument based on the low unit price.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of brand packaging, price points, and enthusiastic consumption in a home environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic social media food-blogging tropes, specifically focusing on 'food porn' visuals (the spray of juice) to trigger viewer engagement.
